sendemailaction.body: A new Journal Entry has been submitted and requires your review and approval.
sendemailaction.subject: You have Journal Entry to Approve

showmessageaction.messagetext: Please enter/review reject reason under communication tab.

sendemailaction.body: Your journal entry has been rejected. Please review the entry and make the necessary corrections before resubmitting.
sendemailaction.subject: Your Journal Entry has been rejected
